calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

Petitioner Nai Phan Chiang (mother) was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Chung Huei Mui, and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan. Petitioner and Interpreter was placed under oath and examined.
Minor's father Ming Chun Mui was not present, but consented to the name change of the minor by way of declartion, filed 03-04-11.was not present, but consented to the name change of the minor by way of declaration, filed 03-04-11.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Cindy Chung Huei Mui.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-09-2010 Amended

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-08-2011 Reset To Mar-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of A ADULT.
Dept. 514, JUDGE ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: J. WILLIS-MCGHEE, CSR KAREN HELD, #2857

Petitioner NAI PHAN CHIANG was present in pro per.
Petitioners was placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for CHANGE OF NAME OF ADULT TO JANICE NAI PHAN CHIANG.
MATTER CONTINUED TO 3/8/11 9AM PROOF OF NOTICE TO THE FATHER FOR MINOR'S NAME CHANGE.
Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
